notes: AI Legend, in-app updates, and several fixes.

features: AI Legend: box a legend and the AI reads each symbol's name + description, then detects them all
Stop button to cancel an AI Find run
In-app updates: get notified and update with one click
App now has a proper icon
fixes: AI Find no longer errors when Engineer Monkey is unreachable (falls back gracefully)
Legend symbol thumbnails now line up with the correct name/description
Typing a space in a layer name works
Opening a project from the library now closes the menu automatically
